evals.name: happy-path-empty-repo
evals.prompt: I'm starting a new project and I want to set up documentation for it. Can you get the docs scaffolding going? I'd like a proper docs site running locally so I can start writing pages.
evals.expected_output: Clones rosetta-template v0.1.0 into docs/, removes docs/.git, runs pnpm install, asks dev/docker or defaults sensibly, starts the server, health-checks GET http://localhost:4321/llms.txt → 200, reports URL + stop command.

evals.name: guard-existing-docs
evals.prompt: Add documentation setup to this repo please.
evals.expected_output: Detects the pre-existing docs/ directory, stops before any destructive action, explicitly asks the user whether to overwrite before proceeding. Must NOT delete or modify docs/ without explicit user consent. Baseline is likely to clobber silently; with skill, the guard should trigger.
files: docs/README.md (pre-staged, contents: 'User\u2019s existing docs — do not delete')
